channel.title: InYourBones Daily Music News
channel.description: Top 5 daily music stories handpicked by InYourBones

item.title: TikTok Calls This Amazon Device a Mini ‘Frame TV’ Dupe: Get It on Sale for Prime Day
item.description: Who needs a fancy 'Frame TV' when you've got this Amazon device?! 🎵 Score it on sale for Prime Day! 🎉 #TechTunes #PrimeDaySteal

item.title: Lorde Releases 49 Virgin Demos for Album’s 1st Anniversary
item.description: 🎉 Celebrate with Lorde as she drops 49 Virgin Demos for her album’s 1st birthday bash! 🎂🎶 #Lorde #NewMusic #AnniversaryVibes

item.title: Ella Langley’s 2026 Tour: How to Get Sold-Out Tickets
item.description: 🎉 Score front row seats to Ella Langley's 2026 tour like a pro! 🎤 #MusicNews #ConcertGoals

item.title: Badvril Announce New Album Lethal: Hear “Fever”
item.description: 🔥🎶 Badvril drops new album "Lethal"! Get ready to feel the "Fever"! 🔥🎵 #NewMusicAlert #BadvrilLethal

item.title: American Football add Music Hall of Williamsburg show to summer tour (tickets on sale now)
item.description: 🎸 More American Football goodness coming your way! Get your tickets and get ready to rock at Music Hall of Williamsburg! 🤘 #AmericanFootball #TourTime
